channel.title: Muses on the papers
channel.description: Recent content in Muses on the papers

item.title: Saif Bajnaid and his chess set
item.description: Chess became a recent obsession of mine. I fell ill sometime last year and picked it up while I quarantined in my studio- I got pretty good too. Learned some of the basic openings and familiarized myself with some of the top dawgs in the sport such as Magnus Carlsen. I knew I was getting good when

item.title: Pasaquan
item.description: Pasaquan is an art site in Buena Vista, GA (pronounced byoona vih-stah). The site was created by an unusual man by the name of Eddie Owens Martin who later became known as St. EOM (pronounced saint oam). The site has undergone many restoration projects over the years lead by the Kohler Foundation, Columbus State University, and the Pasaquan Preservation Society.
